title: Generate CSV Output for Customer Review Summary
scenario: Create a CSV output that summarizes the customer reviews for a product, including review ID, rating, and text. The output must have a header row and 10 data rows. Each data row must list a different review.
constraints: Must have a header row with the column names 'Review ID', 'Rating', and 'Text'
Each data row must have exactly 3 values, in the same order as the header row

evaluationCriteria.description: Check that the output adheres to the specified constraints.
Check that the output is in the correct CSV format, with commas separating values and no extra whitespace.
Check that the output contains the correct customer review data, including review ID, rating, and text.
